function.name: execute_sql_query_tool
function.description: Queries the Databricks marketing database. Use this ONLY when you need factual data to answer the user's question.

user_intent.description: A highly detailed natural language description of the exact data, metrics, or filters needed.

function.name: run_ols_regression_tool
function.description: Performs an Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) multiple regression. Use this when the user asks to analyze the relationship, correlation, or impact of multiple independent numerical variables on a dependent target variable.

dependent_variable.description: The exact column name of the target numerical variable to predict (the Y variable).

independent_variables.description: A list of exact column names for the numerical predictor variables (the X variables).

function.name: run_arima_forecasting_tool
function.description: Performs ARIMA time series forecasting. Use this when the user asks to predict future values based on historical trends.

time_column.description: The exact column name of the timestamp or date variable.

value_column.description: The exact column name of the numerical variable to forecast.

steps.description: The number of future periods to forecast (default is 5).

p.description: The ARIMA model's autoregressive order (default is 1).

d.description: The ARIMA model's differencing order (default is 1).

q.description: The ARIMA model's moving average order (default is 1).
